title: Short title
doc_html:
§995. Short title

            This Part may be cited as the Uniform Controlled Dangerous Substances Law.            Added by Acts 1972, No. 634, §1; Acts 2018, No. 206, §4.
doc_text:
§995.  Short title
This Part may be cited as the Uniform Controlled Dangerous Substances Law.
Added by Acts 1972, No. 634, §1; Acts 2018, No. 206, §4.
